creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I understand

please note that the lack of security in X11 screen lockers is a longstanding issue.

I don't think there is a way to make this secure.

This is especially true if other users are able to interact with the system demons while the screen is locked.

This needs to be reported upstream anyway, can't be fixed in a port.

Have you tested other screen lockers? I suspect the issue affects all of them and is at a deeper level in Xorg.
